title: orthrosanthus laxus var. gramineus
intro: Orthrosanthus laxus var. gramineus, also known as the slender orthrosanthus or grass-leaved orthrosanthus, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Iridaceae and is native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Orthrosanthus laxus var. gramineus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tincture or infused in hot water to create a tea that can be used to treat various health conditions.
